【Oil Wax Black】🎧 Balenciaga New Biker Bag🏍 The increasingly popular Balenciaga biker bag is now available in a new version! Improved on the classic biker bag, retaining iconic elements with a bold, rock-inspired, avant-garde vibe. Spacious enough for daily essentials, fits an iPhone Max. Features adjustable woven shoulder strap with extra eyelets and an external leather card holder. The heart-shaped mirror is replaced by an AirPods holder—simply perfect! Suitable for both men and women.  
Model: 1205  
Size: H21 x W17 x D4.5 cm

BALENCIAGA* Canvas Embroidered Waist Bag [Black & White] 🌀  
With the rise of vintage trends, waist bags once seen as unfashionable have made a strong comeback. In today’s fast-paced world, carrying just your phone, keys, and cash is often enough. Large bags feel cumbersome, holding them is unsafe, and pockets risk losing items—this is where waist bags shine.  
This model features a versatile, stylish color scheme and a practical capacity, balancing function and fashion perfectly.  
Size: 38*17*8 cm

BALENCIAGA LE CITY The most iconic handbag series Le City returns strongly in 2024 with a fresh reinterpretation of the classic. Unlike previous versions, this series removes the mirror and cardholder, and the shoulder strap is redesigned for better crossbody wear. These small changes make the bag feel lighter overall. New pastel colors are perfect for spring and summer. The edgy style contrasts with sweet tones, creating an instantly fashionable look. Size: 29.9 x 19.1 x 9.9 cm.

The latest Balenciaga Crush bag debuts powerfully! First introduced in the Winter 22 collection, the Crush handbag features a unique signature curved shape with a smooth, rounded arch at the base, reinterpreting the classic through deconstruction. Its flexible design allows easy folding and unfolding, combining an arched bottom with sharp edges and a layered interior. Made from polished calfskin with a soft lambskin lining, the bag’s texture and design details highlight its exceptional touch. Dimensions: 25.5 cm L x 10 cm W x 15.5 cm H.

BALENCIAGA 23 New Crushtote Bag "Trash Bag" [Small Denim] perfectly combines the Trash shape with Crush elements. The wrinkled texture highlights its excellent touch, made of soft washed denim and lamb leather, paired with distressed silver hardware, drawstring closure, and front logo print. Compared to the 22 bag, it is lighter and the denim is more durable, capturing the essence of a trash bag better than Chanel. A spacious bucket bag that easily fits items inside. The drawstring closure is a fashion trend this year, allowing quick tightening. The sliding strap design enables hand carry, shoulder, underarm, or crossbody wear. Casual and rebellious—this bag embodies that attitude.  
Model: 0305  
Size Small: 23.8 x 25.9 x 9.9 cm  
Size Large: 39.8 x 45.9 x 13.9 cm
